branch.frontier_task_title: Implement capability-fit and actor assignment evaluation
branch.branch_summary: Start TASK-051 by implementing capability-fit and actor assignment evaluation on top of actor skill packets, so AOF can judge whether an assigned actor has sufficient skills and evidence before execution.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-051 sits on v5.0 after shipped v4.0.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Implement v5.0 Skillful Actor Runtime: turn skills, capabilities, resources, policies, and metrics into live actor assignment and council-reviewed workforce judgment while preserving the Human Recognition Interface as the operator surface.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-051: Implement capability-fit and actor assignment evaluation
